instructions: 2. Wait for the page to fully load (chat interface should appear)
3. In the chat input box, type the following message exactly:
4. Press Enter to send the message
b. Any error message in the chat
c. Whether the AI response comes through or is blocked
6. Take a screenshot of the result
7. Check browser DevTools Network tab for WebSocket frame status
params.expected_behavior: WebSocket connection should be terminated by etap after detecting 'password' keyword in the sent message frame. The user should see a connection error or the response should not arrive.

notes: WebSocket 키워드 검사 최초 테스트. on_upgraded_data() 콜백으로 WS 프레임 내 민감 키워드(password) 감지 → block_session() 호출 확인. 빌드 20260417-142356 배포 완료.
